The heroes who answered the call on #DDay demonstrated extraordinary courage in defense of freedom.

Today, we honor the brave Americans and Allied forces who stormed the beaches of Normandy 82 years ago. Their sacrifice helped secure victory in World War II and exemplified the https://t.co/mF5cqGtPqg

As our nation honors the heroes of #DDay, I’m proud that Arkansan Floyd Brantley will represent the Greatest Generation at this year’s commemoration in Normandy.

A veteran of World War II, Korea and Vietnam, Mr. Brantley embodies a lifetime of service. It has been a privilege
